belier.intro: The Sun finishes its Taurus run and lights up your zone of resources, dear Aries, on the eve of the New Moon. This fertile darkness invites you to plant a financial or material intention rather than charging in headfirst. Mars, your celestial ruler, welcomes this strategic pause before the next leap.
belier.love: Venus slips into Gemini and brings a playful lightness to your exchanges. Partnered, you can propose a new activity, an unplanned outing, a shared burst of laughter. Single, the curiosity you show toward someone matters more than any speech about yourself.
belier.work: This New Moon eve offers a rare window to clarify what you really want to earn in the weeks ahead. You have a chance to revisit your rates, your budget, or the value you place on your time. Better to write three precise intentions than ten vague wishes.
belier.energy: Your Martian fire enjoys this regenerative pause where the body restocks its reserves. Lean into long sleep and feed yourself with meals that actually hold the body.
belier.intuition: The dark moon whispers that your best seeds are sown in inner silence. Ask yourself what you want to see grow, then let the night work for you.
belier.mantra: I sow in silence what I want to harvest
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: You're living the eve of a New Moon in your own sign, dear Taurus, and the universe hands you a fertile blank page. The Sun and Moon prepare their conjunction in your sky, an alignment that only returns once a year. Venus, your ruler, hints that this day is made for dreaming large then anchoring concretely.
taureau.love: Your magnetism reaches a quiet but powerful peak, like a flower open to the morning. Partnered, share a project that carries you both through the next twelve months. Single, formulate clearly the kind of relationship you want to attract, the universe is listening at this precise hour.
taureau.work: This Taurus cycle invites you to redefine your professional foundations with rare precision. You can put on paper your concrete goals, your non-negotiable values, and the rhythm that respects you. A financial decision made today or tomorrow can bear fruit all the way to the November full moon.
taureau.energy: Your body asks for a day of sensory softness, a slow good meal, a walk in nature, a scented bath. Honor your five senses, they are your treasure map.
taureau.intuition: The dark moon in your sky acts like a darkroom developing what wants to be born. Listen to what your body breathes before your mind speaks.
taureau.mantra: I plant my seeds with trust and patience
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Sun crosses your zone of retreat and the unconscious, dear Gemini, on the eve of the Taurus New Moon. This fertile darkness asks you to inwardly close what needs closing before your solar birthday. Mercury, your ruler, prepares your arrival in full light next week.
gemeaux.love: You can observe your bonds with tender clarity, without rushing to conclude. Partnered, an honest conversation on a topic kept on hold can really lighten the atmosphere. Single, becoming aware of the patterns you no longer want to repeat is precious clarity.
gemeaux.work: This final stretch before your new solar cycle invites you to archive, file, finalize. You have a chance to properly close a lingering project rather than launch three new ones. A quiet intuition could help you reformulate a proposal still hanging in the air.
gemeaux.energy: Your fast mind needs long silences to regenerate today. A walk without screen or earbuds gives back more than a thousand cups of coffee.
gemeaux.intuition: The New Moon draws near and clears your inner bag of useless weights. Put down what you're carrying for others and reclaim your own breath.
gemeaux.mantra: I clarify my intentions before I speak
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun activates your zone of friendships and collective projects, dear Cancer, on the eve of the Taurus New Moon. The Moon, your celestial ruler, prepares its great renewal and asks you to choose your tribe carefully. A day when you can set a clear intention on the human circle you want to build.
cancer.love: Your sensitive heart looks for presences that soothe rather than stir. Partnered, talk about your shared dreams for the coming seasons, not just the weekend agenda. Single, an encounter through a friend or a group can prove particularly nourishing.
cancer.work: This dark moon highlights your alliances and professional networks like never before. You have a chance to request a support you didn't dare ask for, your request will land better than you think. Think collective, solitary work isn't the path today.
cancer.energy: Your energy follows the waning lunar rhythm and that's perfectly fine. Pick one or two truly nourishing people rather than a tiring crowd.
cancer.intuition: The moon that fades sharpens your radar on your real affinities. You instantly sense who vibrates in tune, trust that inner compass.
cancer.mantra: I choose my tribe with my heart
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Sun, your ruling star, lights up your zone of career and public recognition, dear Leo. This eve of the Taurus New Moon invites you to plant a long-range professional intention. You can ask yourself what imprint you want to leave over the next twelve months.
lion.love: Your solar presence draws naturally without you having to push the trait. Partnered, propose a project that celebrates your union rather than yet another talk about chores. Single, your aura of calm confidence speaks louder than a grand declaration.
lion.work: The coming conjunction at the peak of your chart offers an uncommon professional launchpad. You have a chance to send an application, ask for a promotion, or set a clear public intention. A symbolic act today beats a thousand hesitations.
lion.energy: Your solar fire slowly climbs toward its best level and asks you to spend it wisely. Avoid overly intense physical efforts, lean on quality rather than quantity.
lion.intuition: The dark moon whispers that your true calling is recognized by the warmth it kindles in your chest. Listen to that inner flame more than outside opinions.
lion.mantra: I shine through actions more than words
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Sun crosses your zone of expansion and meaning-seeking, dear Virgo, on the eve of the Taurus New Moon. This fertile darkness invites you to set a philosophical, intellectual, or travel-related intention. Mercury, your ruler, supports a day of wide and lucid reflection.
vierge.love: You can broaden your affective horizon without giving up your natural clarity. Partnered, a conversation about your deep values or an escape plan brings fresh air to the bond. Single, someone of a different origin, geographic or cultural, could spark your curiosity.
vierge.work: The coming New Moon blesses your intentions around learning, writing, teaching, or publishing. You have a chance to enroll in a program, send a manuscript, or pitch a talk. Think big, your talent for detail will handle the rest just fine.
vierge.energy: Your body asks for outdoor walks and living food. Avoid extended confinement, your nervous system thirsts for open spaces.
vierge.intuition: The dark moon whispers that your excellence doesn't come from control but from trust. Pose a vast question to your heart tonight, the night will do the rest.
vierge.mantra: I widen my horizon without losing my roots
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Sun activates your zone of deep transformation and shared resources, dear Libra. This eve of the Taurus New Moon invites you to set an intention about what you want to regenerate in your intimate or financial life. Venus, your ruler, supports this delicate crossing with grace.
balance.love: Your desire for true intimacy strengthens and you can set your limits softly but firmly. Partnered, a buried topic might be asking to be addressed without drama. Single, you can choose to set aside what doesn't nourish your heart at a deeper level.
balance.work: The approaching New Moon blesses your negotiations around shared money, inheritances, financial contracts. You have a chance to ask for what you're owed or revisit a clause that puts you at a disadvantage. A partnership can transform for the better.
balance.energy: Your energy flows better when you let go of needless weight, objects, emotional debts, old obligations. A symbolic sorting lightens your body as much as your mind.
balance.intuition: The dark moon opens a hatch to your unconscious and drops a silent gift inside. Note your dreams tonight, they carry a precise message.
balance.mantra: I turn what limits me into secret strength
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Sun lights up your zone of partnerships and one-on-one relationships, dear Scorpio, facing you across the sky. This eve of the Taurus New Moon invites you to set an intention on your committed bonds, romantic or professional. Pluto, your deep ruler, quietly works on your relational renewal.
scorpion.love: Your natural intensity finds a sensory rather than dramatic echo chamber today. Partnered, propose a moment where you rediscover each other's physical presence, no agenda. Single, formulate what you really seek, a serious encounter responds better to a clear intention.
scorpion.work: This Taurus New Moon offers you a structuring partnership, a contract, a lasting collaboration. You have a chance to sign what you've been postponing or open a decisive conversation with a partner. Choose quality over quantity in your alliances.
scorpion.energy: Your body asks to be touched gently rather than pushed to the edge. A massage session, a long embrace, or simply walking barefoot reconnects you to the living world.
scorpion.intuition: The dark moon shows the other as a precious mirror of yourself. What you admire or reject in someone tells you a part of you to recognize.
scorpion.mantra: I meet the other without losing myself
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Sun crosses your zone of daily life, work, and health, dear Sagittarius, on the eve of the Taurus New Moon. This fertile darkness invites you to set a concrete intention on your routine and your body. Jupiter, your ruler, accepts this moment of productive humility before the next great surge.
sagittaire.love: Your taste for adventure finds its depth in the small repeated gestures of daily life. Partnered, set up a shared ritual, morning coffee without phones or an evening walk. Single, someone met in a workplace or care setting could move you more than expected.
sagittaire.work: The approaching New Moon invites you to reorganize your schedule in depth. You have a chance to set a clear intention on the rhythm, habits, and tools you want to install. A modest improvement held over time beats a thousand abandoned revolutions.
sagittaire.energy: Your body asks for gentle and steady attention, hydration, sleep, reasonable movement. A preventive check-up scheduled today often proves useful later.
sagittaire.intuition: The dark moon reminds you that the sacred hides in the simple. Wash a cup with full attention and you're already touching the mystery.
sagittaire.mantra: I turn my days into a spiritual path
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Sun activates your zone of creativity, joy, and pleasure, dear Capricorn, on the eve of the Taurus New Moon. This fertile darkness invites you to plant an intention tied to your creative or romantic life. Saturn, your ruler, accepts that you release control for a few hours, by excellent exception.
capricorne.love: Your reserved heart allows itself a light whimsy and that's exactly what makes you irresistible today. Partnered, treat yourselves to a proper date, like in the early days. Single, your deadpan humor and quiet elegance attract those who know how to look.
capricorne.work: This Taurus New Moon blesses your creative, artistic, speculative projects and anything tied to youth or transmission. You have a chance to allow yourself a project that doesn't immediately serve your strategic agenda. Pleasure at work often produces more than constraint.
capricorne.energy: Your body asks for play more than sport, for free movement more than rigid programs. Dance three minutes in your kitchen, you'll feel the difference.
capricorne.intuition: The dark moon whispers that joy isn't a reward but a raw material. Allow yourself some before you've earned it.
capricorne.mantra: I allow myself to create without controlling the outcome
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Sun lights up your zone of home, family, and roots, dear Aquarius, on the eve of the Taurus New Moon. This fertile darkness invites you to set an intention on your living space, your clan, your sense of belonging. Uranus, your inventive ruler, accepts this detour through nourishing soil.
verseau.love: Your need for freedom finds its best balance in a well-laid nest. Partnered, talk about your home, the décor, the place you want to embody together. Single, an encounter in a domestic or family setting can surprise you with its depth.
verseau.work: This Taurus New Moon blesses remote work, the setup of your office, or a project tied to real estate or family. You have a chance to set your intentions on the material base that will support your future flights. Anchoring isn't the opposite of freedom, it's the springboard.
verseau.energy: Your nervous system needs a cocoon and home-cooked meals. A quiet evening at home is well worth the most brilliant outing tonight.
verseau.intuition: The dark moon brings you back to your deep roots and to what built you in silence. What you honor from your past becomes the soil where your future ideas sprout.
verseau.mantra: I anchor my dreams in stable ground
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Sun crosses your zone of communication, writing, and concrete thinking, dear Pisces, on the eve of the Taurus New Moon. This fertile darkness invites you to set an intention on how you say what you carry. Neptune, your subtle ruler, supports a simple speech that holds your magic intact.
poissons.love: Your sensitivity finds a sharper verbal channel today than usual. Partnered, a precise word beats a thousand ambiguous gestures, say the essential without embroidery. Single, an exchange by message, a poem, a short letter could open an unexpected door.
poissons.work: This Taurus New Moon blesses your intentions tied to writing, short exchanges, local travel. You have a chance to send a decisive message, finalize a piece of text, or speak up in a meeting. Your soft voice carries farther than you imagine.
poissons.energy: Your body asks for paced days and clean nights. Avoid the mental snacking that scatters you, choose one thought to embody today.
poissons.intuition: The dark moon weaves a direct link between your dreams and your daytime words. Write upon waking what runs through you, no filter, and keep it carefully.
poissons.mantra: My simple words carry my magic intact
poissons.author: Sibylle
